title: Filipino-Style Braised Pork Belly with Noodles
description: A hearty and flavorful Filipino-inspired dish featuring tender pork belly in a savory sauce served over noodles.
instructions: 1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and garlic and sauté until the onion is translucent.
3. Add the pork belly and cook until browned on all sides.
4. Add the fish sauce, patis, soy sauce, and brown sugar. Stir to combine.
5. Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes.
6. Reduce the heat to low and braise the pork belly for 2 hours, or until tender.
7. Cook the Filipino noodles according to package instructions.
8. Slice the pork belly into thick slices.
9. To serve, place a portion of noodles on a plate, top with a slice of pork belly, and spoon some of the braising sauce over the top.
10. Garnish with chopped green onions and serve hot.
